case_title: ADELA QUESADA LANGAMAN VS. YESSENIA CHILLIN

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR SPANISH INTERPERTER. (506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-18-2022 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO APR-08-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ADELA QUESADA LANGAMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YESSENA CHILLIN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-08-2022 - CONTINUED FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER TO APR-15-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ADELA QUESADA LANGAMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YESSENIA CHILLIN IS PRESENT . SPANISH INTERPERTER IS NOT AVAILABLE BY THE COURT FOR THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (REMARKS: ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS PROVIDED); (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LANGAMAN, ADELA QUESADA AS TO DEFENDANT CHILLIN, YESSENIA

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **NO SIGNATURE** SERVED DEC-15-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHILLIN, YESSENIA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-14-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-18-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ADELA QUESADA LANGAMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YESSENIA CHILLEN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE PROVIDED. PLAINTIFF ADELA QUESADA LANGAMAN IS PRESENT. ELINOR JIMENEZ, CARETAKER TO PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YESSENIA CHILLIN IS PRESENT AND IS ASSISTED BY PATRICE BINAISA, COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPERTER. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
